name: Paracetamol
description: Pain reliever and fever reducer. Commonly used for headaches, body aches, and fever.

name: Ibuprofen
description: Nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) for pain, inflammation, and fever.

name: Amoxicillin
description: Antibiotic used to treat bacterial infections such as ear infections and strep throat.

name: Cetirizine
description: Antihistamine for allergy relief (sneezing, runny nose, itchy eyes).

name: Omeprazole
description: Proton pump inhibitor used to reduce stomach acid and treat GERD.

name: Metformin
description: Oral diabetes medicine that helps control blood sugar levels.

name: Atorvastatin
description: Used to lower cholesterol and reduce the risk of heart disease.

name: Salbutamol
description: Bronchodilator used for asthma relief and to open airways.
